title: Pathfinding Edition for MineColonies
description: Struggling with MineColonies’ AI? Install this addon to greatly improve your city-building experience!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59cfe913acf5c53e523094d9f3e3eea988d2a6f1_0.webp) ![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c87a9522fe1540c940c6d5155a716e9e5a695f99.png)
# 🚀 **Pathfinding Edition for MineColonies** > Fix the frustration. Upgrade the intelligence. Take control of your colony. Tired of citizens getting stuck on random blocks, ignoring your roads, taking absurd detours, or wasting half their day just trying to eat? Pathfinding Edition for MineColonies is designed to solve exactly that. This mod **rebuilds and enhances core AI systems** in MineColonies — making your citizens: - Think smarter 🧠 - Move more efficiently 🏃 - Work with fewer interruptions ⚙️ No more watching your colony fall apart because of bad pathfinding or broken AI logic. --- ## 🧠 **What This Mod Actually Fixes** ### 🧭 Pathfinding That Finally Makes Sense - Citizens **prefer real roads and infrastructure** instead of wandering aimlessly - Smarter handling of **ladders, rails, stairs, and uneven terrain** - Improved **detour logic** — they actually find entrances now - Reduced random jumping, falling, and getting stuck - Emergency handling: stuck citizens can **recover, reroute, or teleport intelligently** > 💡 *Build complex, multi-layer cities without watching your AI completely break.* --- ### 🍽️ Eating AI That Doesn’t Waste Time (Eat At Hut and Food Black List) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1278014/description_15b35a00-e201-4772-a170-b3d73cbcf3b7.png) - Citizens eat **where it makes the most sense** (inventory → workplace → restaurant) - Support for **workplace eating** to reduce unnecessary travel - **Food blacklist system** to control diet behavior - Smarter restaurant flow — you can prepare food in either workspace or restaurant - Hunger urgency = citizens will **rush to eat when needed** > 🍱 *Less walking. More working.* --- ### 🚆 Rail & Transport That Actually Works - Citizens recognize **broken or unpowered rails** - **Detector rails act like stations** for clean dismounting - Minecart speed scales with **skills(only for deliveryman), buffs, and tech** - Smoother rail movement with fewer bugs and stalls > 🛤️ *Yes — building a subway system is finally worth it.* --- ### 🛠️ Worker AI Overhaul (Brand New Farming System) - Lumberjacks collect drops properly (even from leaves 🌿) - Farmers support **crop rotation & modded crops** (Crop Rotation) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1278014/description_eb01dcdb-b29f-4576-84c1-a15149788ce3.png) - Couriers handle **multiple deliveries efficiently** - Smelters work faster with **parallel logic and better fuel usage** - Builders, miners, and others behave more **consistently and reliably** - Animals no longer get out of their pens. Bees no longer get angry when harvest. (Animal Penner) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1278014/description_2ef35eb4-bb7c-4e70-9727-321861d709bc.png) > 🔧 *Workers spend less time bugging out and more time doing their job.* --- ### 🏥 Better Survival & Medical Behavior - Citizens and guards **seek hospitals when injured** - Doctors work smarter, including **night shifts and emergencies** - Improved disease system with **faster and more consistent recovery** - Emergency escape behavior when health is critical > ❤️ *Your colony survives longer — and smarter.* --- ## ⚙️ Highly Configurable & Player-Controlled One of the core goals of this mod is giving control back to the player. Instead of forcing a fixed AI behavior, Pathfinding Edition allows you to **shape how your colony thinks and acts**: - 💡 **You can close new Farmer/Smelter/Deliveryman AI and Eat/Flee AI through config.** - 🧭 Fine-tune **pathfinding costs** (roads, water, stairs, rails, etc.) - 📏 Adjust **maximum pathfinding range** and expansion behavior - 🧠 Modify **heuristics and detour aggressiveness** - 🍽️ Configure **food systems**, including: - General Food blacklist - Minimum stock per hut - Eating priorities and fallback logic - 🌲 Toggle worker behaviors like: - Lumberjack replanting requirements - Leaf-breaking vs item teleporting - 🔥 Control **furnace AI behavior**, worker cooperation, and efficiency scaling - 🚑 Adjust **health thresholds, healing behavior, and emergency reactions** You decide how smart your colony should be. --- ### ⚙️ Deep Customization - Configure **pathfinding costs and behavior** - Control **AI decisions and thresholds** - Define **block path types** (path / not_path / blocked) - Toggle experimental and advanced features > 🛠️ *Fine-tune everything to match your colony design.* --- ## 🎯 **Who Is This For?** This mod is for you if: - Your citizens constantly **get stuck or take bad paths** - Your colony feels **inefficient or chaotic** - You build **large, vertical, or rail-based cities** - You want **more control over AI behavior** - You’re tired of fighting the system instead of playing the game (Tavern Assignment) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1278014/description_d7b989f7-5b74-4d32-84d9-e32c0652158e.png) --- ## ⚠️ Important Notice - This is an **independent addon**, not affiliated with MineColonies - ALPHA / BETA versions may be unstable due to deep AI changes - Expect rapid iteration and continuous improvements - Feel free to report issues or suggestions in our GitHub. --- ## 🌟 **In Short** > Smarter citizens. Faster workflows. Fewer headaches. If vanilla MineColonies AI feels limiting, this mod turns it into something that actually keeps up with your ambition. --- 🙏 Thanks for using **Pathfinding Edition for MineColonies** Let’s make colony AI actually feel intelligent.
